tasks.title: Design Standardized Data Schemas for All Agents
tasks.description: Create JSON schemas for hourly agent updates: Ito (market data), Makoto (financial models), Regulatory (compliance), Kaji (coordination metrics).
checklist: Interview agents about current output formats
Design Ito schema: market intelligence, trading signals
Design Makoto schema: financial models, risk analysis
Design Regulatory schema: compliance tracking, legal requirements
Design Kaji schema: coordination metrics, progress tracking
Create validation rules for each schema
tasks.notes: Workspace audit completed. Starting schema design phase.

tasks.title: Build Hourly Data Ingestion Pipelines
tasks.description: Create automated collection systems that pull agent data hourly, validate against schemas, and store in organized repository.
checklist: Build Ito data collector from workspace
Build Makoto data collector from workspace
Build Regulatory data collector from workspace
Build Kaji data collector from workspace

tasks.title: Create Cross-Agent Integration Engine
tasks.description: Build system that connects agent data to create enriched intelligence: Ito+Makoto = investment signals, Makoto+Regulatory = risk-adjusted recommendations, etc.
checklist: Design integration logic for agent combinations
Build Ito+Makoto connection: market + financial data

tasks.title: Develop Coordinated Intelligence Visualization
tasks.description: Build dashboard that displays integrated agent intelligence in real-time, showing connections and insights across all agent data.

tasks.title: Implement Full Automation & Scalability
tasks.description: Eliminate all manual data handling, add monitoring and alerting, design for scalability to more agents and data volume.
checklist: Add system monitoring and health checks
